Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So, Tartarus and the Dark Hour are on the way out, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}No, that's a good thing. That's what we've been fighting for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1502}Guess this'll be the last time we'll wear these uniforms and hang out after school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1501}Ugh, who cares. I just wanna get into college and start having fun already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 5 25 25}Been goin' on like fighting was my duty and all. But actually... it's just all I'm good at.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 5 25 25}I can't fight worth a shit anyway. Not compared to him at least.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 5 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Dammit! Nothing I do is good enough![n]{f 1 1}
